title: Positive flow: Enter valid phone number and proceed
preconditions: The app is open and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter a valid phone number in the text input field | Click the 'Next' button
expected_result: The app should navigate to the next screen

title: Negative flow: Enter invalid phone number and proceed
preconditions: The app is open and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter an invalid phone number in the text input field | Click the 'Next' button
expected_result: The app should display an error message or not proceed

title: Negative flow: No input and proceed
preconditions: The app is open and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Click the 'Next' button without entering a phone number
expected_result: The app should display an error message or not proceed

title: Negative flow: Empty input field and proceed
preconditions: The app is open and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter an empty phone number in the text input field | Click the 'Next' button
expected_result: The app should display an error message or not proceed

title: Negative flow: Invalid country flag and proceed
preconditions: The app is open and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Select an invalid country flag | Enter a valid phone number in the text input field | Click the 'Next' button
expected_result: The app should display an error message or not proceed
